web.description: Claude SVG Logos - A free AI / LLM model icon set covering major brands and models. Download SVG, PNG, and vectors.
web.markdown:
[All Icons](https://lobehub.com/icons) Claude

# Claude Model Logos

## Download official Claude icon, supporting React / SVG / PNG / WebP   [Official Site: https://claude.ai](https://claude.ai/)

Download Icon

[GithubContribute on GitHub](https://github.com/lobehub/lobe-icons)

![Claude Logo](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/lobehub/lobe-icons/refs/heads/master/packages/static-png/light/claude-color.png)

## Claude Logos Icon Preview

Various modes and formats for icon download are provided below. If you need CDN service, please refer to the following documentation: [CDN Usage](https://github.com/lobehub/lobe-icons#-cdn-usage)

![Claude Mono Logo (LightMod)](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/lobehub/lobe-icons/refs/heads/master/packages/static-png/light/claude.png)

Download Icon

Download Icon

Download Icon

Download Icon

Download Icon

![Claude Avatar](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/lobehub/lobe-icons/refs/heads/master/packages/static-avatar/avatars/claude.webp)Download Icon

## Claude Logos React Components

I'm an Agent

I'm a Human

Send this prompt to your agent to use @lobehub/icons

```
Read https://lobehub.com/icons/skill.md and follow the instructions to use @lobehub/icons
```

Use the React icon package for more variant support, please refer to the following documentation: [@lobehub/icons](https://icons.lobehub.com/components/claude)

Claude

![ClaudeMono.tsx](https://registry.npmmirror.com/@lobehub/assets-fileicon/1.0.0/files/assets/react_ts.svg)

ClaudeMono.tsx

```
import { Claude } from '@lobehub/icons';

export default () => <Claude size={56} />;
```

Claude

![ClaudeColor.tsx](https://registry.npmmirror.com/@lobehub/assets-fileicon/1.0.0/files/assets/react_ts.svg)

ClaudeColor.tsx

```
import { Claude } from '@lobehub/icons';

export default () => <Claude.Color size={56} />;
```

Claude

![ClaudeText.tsx](https://registry.npmmirror.com/@lobehub/assets-fileicon/1.0.0/files/assets/react_ts.svg)

ClaudeText.tsx

```
import { Claude } from '@lobehub/icons';

export default () => <Claude.Text size={56} />;
```

ClaudeClaude

![ClaudeCombine.tsx](https://registry.npmmirror.com/@lobehub/assets-fileicon/1.0.0/files/assets/react_ts.svg)

ClaudeCombine.tsx

```
import { Claude } from '@lobehub/icons';

export default () => <Claude.Combine size={56} />;
```

ClaudeClaude

![ClaudeCombineColor.tsx](https://registry.npmmirror.com/@lobehub/assets-fileicon/1.0.0/files/assets/react_ts.svg)

ClaudeCombineColor.tsx

```
import { Claude } from '@lobehub/icons';

export default () => <Claude.Combine size={56} type={'color'}/>;
```

Claude

![ClaudeAvatar.tsx](https://registry.npmmirror.com/@lobehub/assets-fileicon/1.0.0/files/assets/react_ts.svg)

ClaudeAvatar.tsx

```
import { Claude } from '@lobehub/icons';

export default () => <Claude.Avatar size={56} />;
```

web.markdown:
![claude ai icon and logo in SVG format](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/homarr-labs/dashboard-icons/svg/claude-ai.svg)

# claude ai

Updated on:17 January 2026

By:

SSkyearli

### About this icon

Available in3 formats (SVG, PNG, WEBP) with a base format of SVG. Includes both light and dark theme variants for better integration with different UI designs.

Perfect for adding to dashboards, app directories, documentation, or anywhere you need the claude ailogo.

## Icon variants

Click on any icon to copy its URL to your clipboard

### Base Icon

web.markdown:
